titleStmt.title: SII 16.271: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 271. (A.R. No. 62 of 1915.) CHINNA AHŌBALAM, SIRVEL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the Narasiṁhasvāmin shrine in the Narasiṁhasvāmin temple.

This fragmentary inscription registers the grant of 300 Chakra-gadyas into the temple treasury of god Ahōbalēśvara for the village Chilūru in Podile-sīma as a perpetual endowment (poliyūṭṭu) for offerings and services to the god when he halted in the 16-pillared maṇḍapa built in the temple garden on specified occasions. The name of the donor who held Podile-sīma as his nāyaṅkara and the details of the date are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tirumāle paḍiki
yiccina grāmapolivōṭu kramameṭlannanu sadāsivadēvama
hārāyalu māku nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁcina podile sīmalō
ni cilūri grāmaṁ 1ki rēkhacakra ga 300 Akṣarālānu cakra munnūru
varahālakuṁnnu yī saṁvatsara kā¨rttika Ārabhyaṁgānu śrīAhōbalēśvarula
śrībhaṁḍārānaku grāmaṁ sama¨rpiṁcci polivūṭugaṭṭaḍa vivaramu . naga
ri teruvuna vēyiṁccina tirunaṁdanavanamuṁ gaṭṭiṁcina padahāru staṁbhāla
maṁḍapānanu śrīAhōbalēśvarulu nidhi mīdanuṁḍi pa¨rvamahōtsavā
lanu vēṁccēḷē pūṁṭaluṁnu diguva tirupatinuṁḍi nidhimīdiki vēṁcēśē pūṭala
nu ya 1ki Āragiṁcē pūṁṭalu 16ki pūṭa 1ki taḷighaku biyyaṁ kha 0
vesalu . Ābēḍalu . nni vupu ma 1 miriyālu Āvālu
bella paṁcadāra 1 sama[¨rpi]
Digital edition of SII 16.271 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
